subject: fix(chart): stack controls properly on mobile
body:
Mode toggle and timeline presets now stack vertically on mobile
(flex-col), single row on desktop (sm:flex-row). History + Forecast
buttons use btn-xs on mobile (btn-sm on sm+), overflow-x-auto for
horizontal scroll on very narrow screens, shrink-0 prevents label/
button compression.

Tags: chart, ux, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard
Semver: patch
